content.en:
"Listen, the news of the Endless Dao Ancestor's comprehension of the Immeasurable Dao is not allowed to leak out, and the violator will be regarded as a betrayal of the Nine-Fold Building!"

Dongchen Daozu ordered.

"Yes!"

One Dao Ancestor immediately answered.

They didn't dare to disobey Dongchen Dao Ancestor's orders, otherwise they would end up miserable.

Originally, they wanted to talk to their good friends about Ye Tian's comprehension of the Immeasurable Dao, but now they didn't dare.

At this time, Dongchen Dao Ancestor told Ye Tian: "Endless Dao Ancestor, you have comprehended the Infinite Dao and condensed the Immeasurable Will, and soon you will be able to form the Infinite Dao Domain." If the news is leaked, other forces are afraid that the Nine Ancestors will do it themselves. So, you try not to divulge your situation as much as possible. After you become a half-step ninefold ancestor, it will be okay to be exposed again!"

"Master Dongchen Daozu, I understand!"

Ye Tianying said.

He knows that his current strength is still very weak, and it is not bad to keep a low profile for the time being.

In short, the Infinite Dao Domain is his hole card, and it is easy not to be revealed, and when his cultivation is improved, and after a long period of cultivation, it doesn't matter if he is exposed again.

When he becomes a half-step Ninefold Ancestor, his strength is not even inferior to that of an ordinary Ninefold Ancestor, then it will be difficult to be assassinated.

This is also the reason why Dongchen Dao Ancestor asked him not to be exposed in the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm.

Since Ye Tian had already broken through, there was no point in continuing to stay in the Long Platinum Mountain, and continuing to comprehend would only consume the energy of the Long Platinum Mountain, and it would not help much.

So, Ye Tian left the Changbai Mountain directly.

......

this day.

Ye Tian was practicing the Infinite Dao Domain inside the Truncated Yellow Building, and at this moment he was already able to combine the Infinite Will and the Infinite Dao to form the Infinite Dao Domain.

Compared to the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor's Immeasurable Dao Domain, his Immeasurable Dao Domain was smaller and much weaker, but in the face of an ordinary half-step Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, his Immeasurable Dao Domain could also form a powerful coercion.

With his current strength, there was no problem in dealing with an ordinary half-step nine-fold ancestor, but it was very difficult to kill a half-step nine-fold ancestor.

After all, if you can successfully succeed in a half-step Ninefold Ancestor, there is no one who is too weak, so it is difficult to kill it.

"The Infinite Dao Domain has been successfully condensed, and the next thing is to improve the cultivation and life level, as well as create the Infinite Dao Control Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He has comprehended the Immeasurable Dao, and the level of his own control techniques is low, and he needs to be perfected to the level of the Infinite Dao control skills, and with his comprehension, it will not take much time.

In the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years of the Primordial Era had passed.

In such a short period of time, Ye Tian had successfully perfected his Peerless Yuan Dao Control Technique to the level of Infinite Dao Control Technique.

At this point, his strength has improved again.

It's a pity that it is too difficult to improve his cultivation, not only does it require a huge amount of resources, but it also takes a lot of time, even if he is evil, he can't quickly improve his cultivation to the middle stage of the Eightfold Ancestor.

After all, the cultivation time of the other Eightfold Origin Ancestors is all measured in trillions, so how long has he been cultivating!

And cutting off the forbidden area of the Soul Splitting Red Light, Ye Tian's Soul Splitting Red Beast Replica Body is also looking for resources, but the resources in that area are almost all based on improving the will, and the resources used to improve cultivation are really too rare to be found.

Therefore, Ye Tian currently had no way to rely on the resources there to improve his cultivation.

Ye Tian also tried to leave the Soul Splitting Red Light area, but as soon as he left, he was killed immediately, and he couldn't survive at all.

Beyond the Soul Splitting Red Light area was a flame area, and the horror of that flame was far beyond his imagination, with the cultivation of the Soul Splitting Red Beast, it couldn't survive at all, and as soon as it entered it, it turned into ashes.

"It's better to practice slowly, and you can always improve your cultivation to the middle and late stages of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor and even the peak realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Primordial Ancient Sea, the Underworld Tribe.

This is one of the tribes of the Primordial Ancients, and the Primordial Ancients belong to the most powerful of the Primordial Antiquities, and there are many, many of them.

And the Hades Tribe is also one of the big tribes in the Primordial Ancient Sea, which is much stronger than the Boulder Tribe.

At the beginning, it was also the Hades Tribe who ordered several tribes under its command to attack the Boulder Tribe, and the Boulder Tribe did not dare to stay in the original ancient sea after that, and managed to escape into the border of the Hanhai region.

Because the Boulder Tribe knows very well that the Hades Tribe has the strength to destroy the Boulder Tribe.

Although the Giant Stone Tribe has the existence of the peak of the transformation level, and there are more than eighty transformation level clansmen, but the Pluto Tribe has three hundred transformation level powerhouses, and there are more than thirty of them at the peak of the transformation level alone, among which there are two transformation level powerhouses comparable to the Nine Ancestors of the Nine Buildings and the Nine Ancestors, that is, there are also two transformation level powerhouses comparable to the existence of Dongchen Dao Ancestors.

If this kind of strengthened substance-level existence makes a move, the Boulder Tribe needs at least ten or more chemical-level peak powerhouses to be able to barely block it, and it can't be defeated.

This is also the reason why the Boulder Tribe does not want to compete with the Hades Tribe at all.

However, the Giant Stone Tribe moved into the boundary of the Hanhai Region, and the Hades Tribe has not given up attacking the Great Stone Tribe, and is still trying to break the barrier of the Ancient Nest of the Great Stone and enter the interior of the Ancient Nest of Great Stones.

At this time, a group of Avatar-level peak elders of the Pluto Tribe were discussing the affairs of the Boulder Tribe, and the two supreme solidification-level beings were also present at this meeting.

One of them, the supreme strengthening-level powerhouse, is now the patriarch of the Hades Tribe Stygian Wing spoke: "The Boulder Tribe has fled into the Silent Black Sea, and based on our many investigations, it can be determined that the Boulder Tribe does possess the treasure of the Eternal Flint Stone. The Eternal Flint will allow me and other primordial ancients to break boundaries and give birth to one more Ascendant-level. However, those idiots of the Boulder Tribe can't use the Eternal Flint at all, and it's a waste for them to hold the Eternal Flint Stone!"

"Patriarch, the Boulder Tribe has fled into the Silent Black Sea, and we can't help it, we can't all kill us into the Silent Black Sea, those top forces in the Silent Black Sea won't allow us to pass. "

A Transformation-level peak elder said.

Wrath Wing shook his head, "Naturally, it can't just pass, but what I care about is not the Eternal Flint Stone, but where did the Boulder Tribe get the Eternal Flint from? "

The other clansmen shook their heads, they didn't know either.

At this time, another powerhouse at the fortified level, Stygian Cloud, said: "It's a pity that we couldn't confirm the existence of the Eternal Flint at the beginning, and I was afraid of attracting the attention of other tribes to the fortified level, so I and the Stygian Patriarch didn't make a move, otherwise if we made a move together, we would have taken down the Giant Stone Tribe a long time ago!"

"There's no point in saying this, let's think about how to defeat the Boulder Tribe and take the Eternal Flint Stone, in case it takes a long time, the idiots of the Boulder Tribe use up the Eternal Flint Stone, and all our efforts will be meaningless!" Hades said.

The chemical class made one suggestion after another, but all of them were rejected.

"I have a suggestion, we can borrow their tribal treasure, the Clothes of Nothingness, from the Void Tribe, and let the Patriarch or Lord Stygian wear it, dive into the Silent Black Sea, and then enter the Great Stone Lair, and after finding the location of the Eternal Flint Stone, immediately snatch the Eternal Flint from it. At that time, they couldn't stop it. A Transformation-level peak elder suggested.

Stygian Wing and Stygian thought about it carefully, this method may not be very good, but there is a possibility of success.

"Then use this method!"

Wrath agreed!
